_comment: Single source of truth for the dashboard. Add one object per app. 'site' = deployed public URL (omit until live). 'type': static | webapp | script. The dashboard auto-groups Live first, then by type, and search filters across everything.

apps.name: AnnoTag
apps.desc: Tag any web page and re-find your notes — extension + annotag.io + accounts API.

apps.name: Atelier
apps.desc: Distraction-free novel-writing app — scenes, chapters, and worldbuilding.

apps.name: Compass
apps.desc: Master productivity app organized by Who / What / Where / When / Why / How.

apps.name: Contractor Calculator
apps.desc: Compare W-2 vs. contractor take-home pay.

apps.name: emagic
apps.desc: Emagic marketing site (has a PHP contact form).

apps.name: Expense Manager
apps.desc: Spreadsheet-style expense tracker split by business entity.

apps.name: Gap Bot
apps.desc: Python engine researching the gap-fill options edge on SPY / QQQ.

apps.name: GigaHuman
apps.desc: Life-inventory app scoring every area of your life 1–10.

apps.name: MBA Library
apps.desc: Personal reference library of MBA frameworks, organized by class.

apps.name: PEG Ratio Comparison
apps.desc: Compare whether stocks' growth justifies their P/E.

apps.name: Recipe Manager
apps.desc: Save and organize recipes, seeded from a Notion export.

apps.name: Scripture Study
apps.desc: Scripture study + worldbuilder for the Standard Works.

apps.name: Utah Characters
apps.desc: Utah Characters — site with a PHP contact form.
